calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-28-2015 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-10-2015 Continued To Sep-28-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barry Schneider, for Petitioner Joseph Marzette; Beverley Meyers for Dept. of Health Care Services
Ms. Meyers informed the Court that the parties have reached a settlement in principle, but needed some additional time to bring it to conclusion. She requested that the hearing on the final petition be put over until the settlement can be completed. Mr. Schneider had no objection to the request. The matter was continued to September 28, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.
Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-15-2015 Continued To Aug-10-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-11-2015 Continued To Jun-15-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barry Schneider for and with Joseph Marzette. Beverly Meyers for (objectors) Department of Health Care.

Ms. Meyers reported that the parties have agreed to a continuance and that she is optimistic they can settle. Mr. Schneider reported that his client has lived in the residence, is unable to obtain a hardship claim, that they are continuing to look into a creditors claim and will review the statute of limitations. The accounting petition was continued to June 15, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Robles. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-06-2015 Continued To May-11-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Inventory & Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Adminstration
Off Calendar Jan-07-2015 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-07-2015 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-29-2014 Continued To Jan-07-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Inventory & Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Adminstration
Off Calendar Oct-29-2014 Continued To Jan-07-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barry Schneider for and with Joseph Marzette.

Mr. Schneider stated that they have not received the inventory back from Mr. Kasolas (Probate Referee), that there is a Department of Healthcare Services ("DHS") lien, that they went through a hardship hearing and that until the lien turns into a judgment, no interest is being paid. Mr. Schneider also stated that interest will be about $20,000.00 a year, that Mr. Marzette is living in the property and fixing it up, and that they will keep working with DHS. Furthermore, Mr. Schneider stated that they received the stock from the Public Guardian, that they will sell the stock for payment of the appraisal and some bills, and that the taxes and insurance on the property are up to date. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal; petition for final distribution, etc. was continued to January 7, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court reminded Counsel of the Probate Code requirements.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Inventory & Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Adminstration
Off Calendar Oct-02-2014 Continued To Oct-29-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-02-2014 Continued To Oct-29-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Inventory & Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Adminstration
Off Calendar Sep-23-2014 Continued To Oct-21-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney Barry Schneider and the Administrator Joseph Marzette to appear on October 21, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the inventory and appraisal, petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. If no appearance is made on that date, sanctions in the amount of $25.00 per day will commence/be imposed against each Party. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-26-2011 Granted Per Written Order
